datasets.name: Sales goal
datasets.query: SELECT sum(total_price) AS Total_Sales, 3000000 AS Sales_Goal FROM databricks_simulated_retail_customer_data.v01.sales;

datasets.name: Sales over 3 mounth
datasets.query:
SELECT customer_name, 
       total_price AS Total_Sales, 
       date_format(order_date, "MM") AS Month, 
       product_category 
FROM databricks_simulated_retail_customer_data.v01.sales 
WHERE order_date >= to_date('2019-08-01')
AND order_date <=  to_date('2019-10-31');

widgets.title: Sales Goal
widgets.description: Displays total sales vs sales goal with color coding

widgets.title: Three Month Sales
widgets.description: Shows total sales and number of sales by month (Aug-Oct 2019)

widgets.title: Average Sales by Category
widgets.description: Bar chart showing average, min, and max sales by product category

widgets.title: Bar 2
widgets.description: Scatter plot of daily order dates vs sum of total price
